title: Bug ID 753912: UDP flows may not be swept

content.body_text:
## Symptoms

Some UDP connection flows do not show in connection table but do show up in stats. This might occur with datagram_lb mode is enabled on the UDP profile under heavy load.

## Impact

Increased memory utilization of TMM.

## Conditions

-- UDP profile with datagram_lb mode enabled. -- System under heavy load.

## Workaround

None.

## Fix Information

The system now correctly manages all expired flows.

## Guides & references

[**K10134038: F5 Bug Tracker Filter Names and Tips**](https://my.f5.com/manage/s/article/K10134038)
